nameEn: International Conference on Research in Computational Molecular Biology
description: A top-tier conference in computational molecular biology, focusing on algorithmic and mathematical approaches to biological problems. It covers sequence analysis, evolutionary modeling, and regulatory network analysis, publishing theoretically rigorous computational biology research.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Centrifuger: lossless compression of microbial genomes for efficient and accurate metagenomic sequence classification
ralphi: a deep reinforcement learning framework for haplotype assembly

descriptionKo: 계산 분자 생물학 분야의 탑티어 학회로, 알고리즘과 수학적 모델에 기반한 생물학적 문제 해결에 초점을 맞춘다. 서열 분석, 진화 모델링, 규제 네트워크 분석 등을 다루며, 이론적으로 엄밀한 계산생물학 연구가 발표된다.
descriptionEn: A top-tier conference in computational molecular biology, focusing on algorithmic and mathematical approaches to biological problems. It covers sequence analysis, evolutionary modeling, and regulatory network analysis, publishing theoretically rigorous computational biology research.
